race.comment: Patrick Payne holds the key here. PHOEBE BUFFAY (7) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when fifth, beaten 1.5 lengths, over 1400m at Pakenham Synthetic. Has further improvement to come and looks a clear threat down in grade a touch. PICK A SYMPHONY (5) accounted for a maiden field over 1400m at Bendigo last start, winning by 1-1/4 lengths. Reunites with Brad Rawiller, who was on board last start, and looms as one of the hardest to beat again. SACRED FORT (1) has been good in three runs back from a spell, all in 62 grade. Peak fitness now, drops to a BM56 and draws nicely. CLINGER (3) resumes here and while he will be better over further later in the prep, he's won first-up before and won both jumpouts in preparation for this. OUR DIVINYL (6) raced on the speed from the outset last start and finished second, beaten 1.2 lengths, over 1200m at Port Augusta. Hard to beat in this suitable race.
